svg.title: C4 Component diagram for the Unified Commerce Lakehouse data pipeline
svg.desc: Zooms into the Airflow container to show its internal components: the 4 DAGs, the Bronze/Silver/Gold transformation modules they call, the Data Contract validation gate on the Shopify source, and the Great Expectations checkpoints at each layer boundary.
svg.text: Inside: Airflow container — pipeline components (ingestion/, transformations/, quality/)
Gold Delta tables (MinIO) — Revenue, Channel Performance,
